sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Run ability
special_mechanics.description: Sam can run 'like a dog' to move faster

special_mechanics.name: Shout attack
special_mechanics.description: Ability to defeat all enemies on screen simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Hang glider
special_mechanics.description: Vehicle used in certain levels for platforming gimmicks

special_mechanics.name: Weapon system
special_mechanics.description: Default spiked club with replaceable weapons (spears, axes) having limited ammo

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative only. No precise physics parameters documented. Sources praise 'strong play control' and note Sam as 'young and agile' but provide no quantitative movement data. Game received positive reviews for gameplay and control feel but technical specifications are not available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Prehistorik Man (SNES)
